subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abha Beauty! What thou hast written is indeed the very truth. Man is ever under the dominion of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی آنچه نگاشتی فی الحقیقه عین واقعست انسان همواره در تحت سطوت
subcodes.subjects: @idle fancies; lust and passion, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for protection
